title: Architecture
summary: Cross-repository ownership, projections, shared artifact patterns, and system-level architecture references.
content_html:
Architecture

This section describes cross-repository ownership and contracts that do not belong to one app or public surface.

Use this section for:

  • system-level purpose and boundaries
  • source, generated, public, and working ownership
  • cross-domain projection rules and validation
  • shared artifact patterns

References

  • Knowledge System Vision for the cross-system purpose of Studio, Analytics, Docs Viewer, Data Sharing, semantic tokens, and the hybrid Analysis scope
  • Source Tree Ownership for the maintained boundary between Studio source, Docs Viewer source, public source, generated output, and local working output
  • Projection Contract for canonical source, local projection, and public projection boundaries
  • Projection Contract Validation for executable cross-boundary enforcement
  • Shared Artifact Patterns for reuse that crosses app ownership
  • Site for the public catalogue, routes, shell, design, and runtime data flow
